creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
I started some time ago to write a manual and a CBSD script to automatically setup on jail based setup for Gitlab.

Maybe that helps you:
https://gitlab.fechner.net/mfechner/gitlab-cbsd/-/blob/master/CBSDfile?ref_type=heads#L74

I see that allow_sysvipc=1 and allow_raw_sockets=1 is set there.
Have you set this as well?
